annotations.summary: Transaction approval rate has dropped more than 15% compared to baseline
annotations.description: Compares current-hour approval rate to 24h baseline.

model.rawSql: SELECT baseline_rate - current_rate AS rate_drop FROM (SELECT countIf(status = 'approved') * 100.0 / count() AS baseline_rate FROM silver.transactions_silver WHERE _ingested_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR) AS b, (SELECT countIf(status = 'approved') * 100.0 / count() AS current_rate FROM silver.transactions_silver WHERE _ingested_at >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) AS c
